channel.title: SHOTAVIX Camera Blog
channel.description: In-depth camera reviews, honest buying advice, and photography inspiration — made for enthusiasts, by enthusiasts.

item.title: I Shot an Entire Event in RAW for the First Time — Here's What Changed
item.dc:creator: Shed Vin
item.description: A personal story: shooting my first full event in RAW, the mistakes I made, the lessons I learned, and why I'll never shoot JPEG-only again.
item.content:encoded: A personal story: shooting my first full event in RAW, the mistakes I made, the lessons I learned, and why I'll never shoot JPEG-only again.

item.title: Your Camera Doesn't Matter as Much as You Think. Here's Proof
item.dc:creator: Shed Vin
item.description: A personal essay on gear acquisition syndrome, the myth that expensive cameras make better photos, and why the most important tool in photography is between your ears.
item.content:encoded: A personal essay on gear acquisition syndrome, the myth that expensive cameras make better photos, and why the most important tool in photography is between your ears.

item.title: Is the Canon R5 Mark II Actually Worth $4,000? My Honest Answer
item.dc:creator: Shed Vin
item.description: After shooting the Canon R5 Mark II for a full wedding season, here's my honest verdict on whether this $4,000 camera is worth the investment or just hype.
item.content:encoded: After shooting the Canon R5 Mark II for a full wedding season, here's my honest verdict on whether this $4,000 camera is worth the investment or just hype.

item.title: Everyone Is Buying the Wrong First Camera in 2026 (Here's What to Get Instead)
item.dc:creator: Shed Vin
item.description: After watching hundreds of beginners struggle, here's my honest advice on buying your first camera in 2026. Spoiler: it's probably not what you think.
item.content:encoded: After watching hundreds of beginners struggle, here's my honest advice on buying your first camera in 2026. Spoiler: it's probably not what you think.

item.title: Mirrorless Killed the DSLR — But Was That Actually a Good Thing?
item.dc:creator: Shed Vin
item.description: After 15 years with DSLRs, I finally switched to mirrorless in 2026. Here's what I gained, what I lost, and whether the death of the DSLR is something to celebrate or mourn.
item.content:encoded: After 15 years with DSLRs, I finally switched to mirrorless in 2026. Here's what I gained, what I lost, and whether the death of the DSLR is something to celebrate or mourn.

item.title: The Photography Advice I Wish Someone Had Told Me 10 Years Ago
item.dc:creator: Shed Vin
item.description: After a decade behind the camera, here are the hard-won lessons I wish someone had shared with me when I started photography. Gear, mindset, composition, and more.
item.content:encoded: After a decade behind the camera, here are the hard-won lessons I wish someone had shared with me when I started photography. Gear, mindset, composition, and more.
